name: Aspire Mining Limited
description: Aspire Mining Limited is an Australian-listed mineral exploration and development company focused on discovering and developing world-class metallurgical coal assets in Mongolia. The company's flagship asset is the 100%-owned Ovoot Coking Coal Project, located in northwestern Mongolia, which is highly regarded for its potential to produce high-quality coking coal. Aspire Mining is dedicated to developing the Ovoot Project in a sustainable and environmentally responsible manner, aiming to become a significant supplier of premium coking coal to global steel markets.
